## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows [MediaWiki PHP coding conventions](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Manual:Coding_conventions/PHP)
- [ ] PHPUnit tests pass (`composer test`)
- [ ] PHPStan passes (`composer phpstan`)
- [ ] PHPCS passes (`composer phpcs`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated (wiki pages, README, or inline PHPDoc) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] i18n messages added/updated in `en.json` and `qqq.json` if new strings were introduced
